claim_text: High-risk obligations deferred to 2 Dec 2027 / 2 Aug 2028 by the Digital Omnibus political agreement; standards not ready before Q4 2026
GPAI regime is notification-not-gate (notify within 2 weeks above 10^25 FLOPs; Code of Practice voluntary)
Biden EO 14110 rescinded within hours (EO 14148, 20 Jan 2025); EO 14179 issued 23 Jan 2025
Federal preemption attempt: Cruz 10-year moratorium defeated 99-1; EO 14365 (11 Dec 2025) DOJ litigation task force
SB 53 (TFAIA) signed 29 Sep 2025, effective 1 Jan 2026; survived federal preemption attempt; governors affirmed enforcement
SB 24-205 delayed (Aug 2025) then repealed/replaced by narrower SB 26-189 (14 May 2026) before taking effect
Realization S via registration gate; Labeling Measures effective 1 Sep 2025; CSL AI provision effective 1 Jan 2026; sustained CAC filing enforcement
Enacted Law 134/2025/QH15 (10 Dec 2025, 429/434 votes), effective 1 Mar 2026; comprehensive risk-tiered hard law — clean falsifier of the developmental-promotional prediction
At t-24 had active PDPL consultation (Sep 2024) + digital-tech legislative pipeline + 'era of national rise' (To Lam 2024) + benchmarked up vs Korea/Japan; NO stated light-touch declaration
AI Basic Act signed Jan 2025, effective 22 Jan 2026; MSIT Enforcement Decree sets 10^26 FLOP threshold
AI Promotion Act effective 4 Jun 2025; no monetary penalties (reputational/cooperative enforcement)
National AI Plan (Dec 2025) explicitly rejected mandatory guardrails; migrated from legislative-pending (t-12) to deliberate-light-touch (t-0)
MeitY AI Governance Guidelines (5 Nov 2025) explicitly voluntary; IT Secretary: 'consciously chosen not to lead with regulation'
INAI dissolved by constitutional reform (effective 20 Dec 2024); functions transferred 21 Mar 2025 — built capacity dismantled
2026 King's Speech: Regulating for Growth Bill, no standalone AI bill; DSIT/DBT joint letter to 19 regulators (Jan 2026) — explicit stated light-touch
PL 2338 Senate-approved 10 Dec 2024; Chamber plenary vote scheduled 27 May 2026 (outcome unconfirmed as of 31 May 2026); ANPD as residual authority; fines to BRL 50M
Bill 16821-19 introduced by Executive 7 May 2024; Chamber-approved 13 Oct 2025; in Senate (2nd constitutional review); no AI law in force as of Feb 2026
Government bill to Senate 28 Jul 2025; one of 20+ competing proposals; not enacted as of early 2026 — fragmented pipeline
Charter for AI (Jun 2024) non-binding; National AI System as Cabinet advisory member (Jun 2025); Regulatory Intelligence Office (Apr 2025); no binding AI Act
Mobley v. Workday agent theory survived (Jul 2024); ADEA-covers-applicants ruling 6 Mar 2026; 10,000+ employer-deployers exposed
Financial-services model-risk deployers are S/S — the Atlas's highest-realization node; SR 11-7 (2011) lineage predates AI; 'deployers lag' is false
Missed self-imposed Frontier Safety Policy deadline twice; Grok 4 shipped without a system card despite Seoul commitments
Of 20 Seoul signatories, 12 published frontier safety frameworks by Dec 2025; commitments carry a self-revision clause
EU ratified the CoE Framework Convention on AI on 15 May 2026 in Chisinau
GDP-GIRAI correlation R^2=0.5656 (third-party re-analysis of GIRAI 138-country dataset) — the magnitude/capacity baseline morphology must beat
